zh.lifeSummary: Adélaïde Emelde於0971年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯o波奧。她於大約0999年與Guichard I de Beaujeu在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯o波奧結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1050年在她的家鄉享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: Emelde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German: occupational name from a derivative of Middle High German melden ‘to announce or proclaim’.

nameMeanings.name: Adélaïde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: Adélaïde Emelde was born in 0971, in Beaujeu, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France. She married Guichard I de Beaujeu about 0999, in Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1050, in her hometown, at the age of 79.

ko.lifeSummary: Adélaïde Emelde(은)는 0971년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 ho니 보j우에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 0999년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 ho니 보j우에서 Guichard I de Beaujeu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1050년 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Adélaïde Emelde родилась в 0971 г. в местности боджеу, рoн, рoне-алпесь, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guichard I de Beaujeu около 0999 г. в местности боджеу, рoн, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1050 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.
